subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared rural two-lane road
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it crests the hill against the dusk, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes over the fields, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the rolling rural road, cresting a hill, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A rural two-lane road over rolling hills at deep dusk fading to night, a clear autumn sky holding a last dim band low in the west, no central divider. Dry asphalt with worn lane markings and a faded white edge line runs between harvested fields and hedgerows going to silhouette. The road rolls up and crests a hill ahead, the rise briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane against the darkening sky. Beyond the crest the fields sink into blue-black with a few distant farm lights.

lighting.conditions: Deep-dusk-into-night over rolling farmland with a last western glow; no street lighting, headlights only, dry roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare cresting the hill ahead and slightly left against the dusk
lighting.shadows: Long fading blue shadows from hedgerows stretching across dry asphalt, deepening to black
lighting.illumination_effect: Faint western dusk band over silhouetted fields with headlight pools on the road; oncoming high beams crest the hill with overwhelming bloom, lens-flare starbursts, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Rolling road cresting a hill near mid-frame with a low dusk band beyond, oncoming glare cresting upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep blue dusk with a warm western band over dry grey asphalt and silhouetted fields, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, quiet, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious as night falls
aesthetics.patterns: Rolling hedgerows and dashed lane markings sliding past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking over rolling hills, subtle vertical bob over the crest, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and lane markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a rural two-lane road

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the rolling rural road at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past a hill crest
Vehicle crests the hill; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the dusk view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, rolling road becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the rolling rural road at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing past a hill crest
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear against the dusk
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Cresting the hill as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare against the darkening sky
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, rolling road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a rural road over rolling hills at deep dusk, ego headlights over worn markings with a last western glow beyond, while a faint glow appears past a hill crest. By 0:01 the vehicle crests the hill and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens against the dusk. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, lens-flare starbursts, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the rolling road reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on dry asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates over the crest. Evening crickets and a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing, quiet rural dusk; no music or speech.
